description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a slightly flattened base and a robust, segmented body. Its surface is a rich, natural orange with subtle mottling and shading, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. The pumpkin features deep vertical grooves that accentuate its plump, lobed sections. At the top, a thick, slightly curved greenish-brown stem emerges, adding to its authenticity. The skin appears matte with a semi-rough texture, typical of a fresh pumpkin. There are no visible carvings, facial features, or decorative accessories on its surface.
description: A plump, orange pumpkin with deep grooves and a thick, curved stem. Its surface is matte and naturally mottled, with no carvings or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pumpkin's rounded body, deep grooves, and the thick stem centered at the top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the curvature of the stem and the pronounced lobes on the left side.
description_view_2: The pumpkin appears slightly more symmetrical from this view, with the stem leaning forward.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the right-side lobes and the stem's tilt, with visible mottling on the surface.
